plan_name: Consolidated Meath County Development Plan 2021-2027 (as varied)
plan_status: Adopted/consolidated; Variations 1 & 2 adopted 13 May 2024, Variation 3 adopted 27 January 2025
dm_standards_chapter: Chapter 11 - Development Management Standards and Land Use Zoning Objectives
portal: consult.meath.ie (shared LA consultation portal, per-chapter HTML)
notes: Rural one-off house standards are NOT in Ch.11 (chapter defers them to Ch.9 Rural Development Strategy); parking standards are in Ch.11 Section 9 (captured). Density is guideline-referenced, no fixed uph table.
